title: Keybind preset registry
description: Ordered registry of keybind presets shared across surfaces. The first entry is the default fallback. The active preset is whichever file the engine's KeybindingFile config points at; uikeys.txt is Custom.

name.description: Display name; also the key used to look a preset up by name.

file.description: Bind file this preset loads (the engine KeybindingFile value). uikeys.txt is the Custom preset.

custom.description: True for the user-editable Custom preset (uikeys.txt).
